items.name: Employers' Liability Insurance
items.notes: Caught expired by the policy bot. Upload the renewed certificate to set the next date.

items.name: Enhanced DBS checks (staff and volunteers)
items.notes: No renewal date on file. Add the earliest staff DBS renewal so it can be tracked.

items.name: Paediatric First Aid certificate
items.notes: No expiry on file. First aid certificates typically last 3 years. Add the certificate date.

items.name: Ofsted childcare registration or exemption
items.notes: Confirm registration status and any review date so it can be tracked.
